name: sycophancy-hooks
description: Single-plugin marketplace for sycophancy-hooks: execution-layer enforcement for anti-sycophancy in Claude Code

plugins.name: sycophancy-hooks
plugins.description: Anti-sycophancy enforcement for Claude Code. Detects judgment-type prompts, requires structured self-audit blocks, and flags missing or malformed responses via next-turn reminder (exit(2) hint, not current-response blocking).
